open.description: Controls whether the modal is open; bindable for controlled usage.

title.description: Text rendered as the modal's visible heading and used as its accessible label.

dismissOnBackdropClick.description: When true, clicking the backdrop outside the modal panel dismisses it. Default `true`.

dismissOnEscape.description: When true, pressing Escape dismisses the modal. Default `true`.

showCloseButton.description: When true, renders the close button in the upper corner of the modal panel. Default `true`.

class.description: Additional class names merged with the component's root class.

role.description: ARIA role applied to the underlying dialog element. Default `dialog`.

describedById.description: When set, applied as aria-describedby on the underlying <dialog>. Pass a short, plain description ID only.

unsupportedProps.name: ondismiss
unsupportedProps.description:
Fired on user-initiated dismissal. Includes: Escape key (native dialog 'cancel' event),
backdrop click, and the close-X button. EXCLUDES: parent-driven open = false.
Callbacks are not awaited and thrown callbacks do not block close.
